Title: Signup form is reachable from header
Steps: 1. Click 'Signup / Login' in header  2. Locate 'New User Signup!' section
Expected_Result: Login page opens. Right side shows 'New User Signup!' heading with Name input, Email input, and 'Signup' button.

Title: Initial signup with valid name and email opens full form
Steps: 1. In 'New User Signup!' enter unique name and email  2. Click 'Signup'
Expected_Result: User is taken to 'Enter Account Information' page. Email field is pre-filled and read-only. Title, Name, Password, Date of Birth, Address fields are all visible.

Title: Complete registration with all required fields succeeds
Preconditions: User is on 'Enter Account Information' page
Steps: 1. Select title 'Mr'  2. Enter password  3. Select DOB (day/month/year)  4. Enter First name, Last name, Address, Country, State, City, Zipcode, Mobile  5. Click 'Create Account'
Test_Data: password: Test@1234, DOB: 1995-06-15, full address details
Expected_Result: Account is created. 'ACCOUNT CREATED!' confirmation page is shown with 'Continue' button. Email exists in system after this.

Title: Signup rejects an email that is already registered
Steps: 1. On /login enter any name and the existing email  2. Click 'Signup'
Expected_Result: Error message 'Email Address already exist!' appears below the email field. User stays on the same page, no account is created.

Title: Signup is blocked when name is empty
Steps: 1. Leave name empty  2. Enter unique email  3. Click 'Signup'
Expected_Result: HTML5 'Please fill out this field' tooltip appears on name input. Form is not submitted.

Title: Signup is blocked when email is empty
Steps: 1. Enter any name  2. Leave email empty  3. Click 'Signup'
Expected_Result: HTML5 'Please fill out this field' tooltip appears on email input. Form is not submitted.

Title: Signup rejects malformed email
Steps: 1. Enter any name  2. Enter malformed email  3. Click 'Signup'
Expected_Result: HTML5 'Please include an @ in the email address' tooltip appears. Form is not submitted.

Title: Required fields on account info page are validated
Preconditions: User is on 'Enter Account Information' page
Expected_Result: Form does not submit. Browser-native validation tooltip appears on the password field.

Title: Date of birth defaults are not auto-selected
Preconditions: User is on 'Enter Account Information' page
Steps: 1. Inspect Day / Month / Year dropdowns on first load
Expected_Result: Each dropdown shows placeholder 'Day' / 'Month' / 'Year' rather than a pre-filled value. Forces user to make a deliberate choice.

Title: Newsletter checkbox state is preserved on submit
Preconditions: User is on 'Enter Account Information' page
Steps: 1. Tick 'Sign up for our newsletter!'  2. Complete and submit form
Expected_Result: Account is created with newsletter opt-in stored. (Cannot verify from UI alone — requires backend / DB check.)

Title: Account creation success page links work
Expected_Result: User is redirected to home page. Header shows 'Logged in as <name>'. User is automatically signed in.

Title: Created account can be deleted from header
Steps: 1. Click 'Delete Account' in header  2. Confirm deletion
Expected_Result: 'ACCOUNT DELETED!' page is shown. User is logged out. Same email can be used to register a new account.

Title: XSS attempt in name field is escaped
Steps: 1. Enter XSS string as name  2. Enter unique email  3. Continue through full registration
Expected_Result: No JavaScript executes during registration or on any page that later renders the name. Name is rendered as plain text.

Title: Mobile number accepts international format
Preconditions: User is on 'Enter Account Information' page
Steps: 1. Enter mobile in international format with +  2. Complete and submit form
Expected_Result: Form accepts the value and account is created. No validation error.
